rounds.sourceText: sc (both loops), in flo of next st (hdc, 2 dc, hdc) to form first ear, sc 3 (both loops), in flo of next st (hdc, 2 dc, hdc) to form second ear, sc 6 (both loops). (18)
rounds.title: Round 6

actions.note: blo of st from round 5; bend first ear forward and sc in blo of st from round 5
blo of st from round 5; bend second ear forward and sc in blo of st from round 5

rounds.sourceText: sc (both loops), bend first ear forward and sc in blo of st from round 5, sc 3 (both loops), bend second ear forward and sc in blo of st from round 5, sc 6 (both loops). (12)
